Who We Are

We are a locally operated exterior services business specializing in Permanent LED Lighting and professional power washing. We take pride in helping homeowners and businesses improve the look, value, and cleanliness of their properties year-round.

With permanent LED lighting, we offer a modern, hassle-free solution that gives you full control of your home or storefront lighting with millions of color options, custom scenes, and reliable performance in every season. Whether it's for holidays, events, or everyday curb appeal, we make sure every install is clean, precise, and built to last.

On the power washing side, we focus on restoring surfaces safely and effectively, from siding and driveways to patios, decks, and commercial properties. Our goal is always the same: deliver high-quality results that make your property stand out.

Customer satisfaction is our top priority, and we're committed to making sure every client is happy with the final result.

Our Services

💡 Permanent LED Lighting

Upgrade your property with permanent LED lighting designed for convenience, style, and year-round use. Our systems give you complete control with millions of color options, customizable scenes, and scheduling right from your device. Whether you're celebrating holidays, hosting events, or enhancing everyday curb appeal, our installations are discreet, durable, and built to withstand every season. Enjoy a sleek, maintenance-free lighting solution that makes your home or business stand out day and night.

💧 Professional Power Washing

Bring your property back to life with our professional power washing services. We safely and effectively remove dirt, grime, mold, and buildup from siding, driveways, patios, decks, and commercial surfaces. Using the right techniques for each material, we restore your property's appearance without causing damage. The result is a cleaner, brighter, and more polished look that instantly boosts curb appeal and protects your investment.
